tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride, total cholesterol, and LDL cholesterol, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Glucose metabolism and renal function are normal. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend monitoring lipid profile and considering cardiovascular risk management as clinically indicated.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
